meta.title: Consent to Terms and Conditions – DOCPATS MedConnect
meta.description: Detailed consent statement for accepting the Terms and Conditions and related policies of DOCPATS MedConnect.

header.title: Consent to Terms and Conditions
header.subtitle: Please read this consent statement carefully before proceeding.

section1.title: 1. Scope of My Consent
section1.text: By continuing to use DOCPATS MedConnect and by indicating my acceptance (for example, by checking a box, clicking an “I Agree” button, or proceeding with registration or login), I expressly confirm and agree that:
list: I have carefully reviewed and understood the current version of the Terms and Conditions that govern the use of DOCPATS MedConnect (the “Platform”).

I agree to be legally bound by the Terms and Conditions, as well as by all related policies, including but not limited to the Privacy Policy, Data Protection Policy, and any specific clinical or organizational rules that apply to my use of the Platform.
I understand that these Terms and Conditions may be updated from time to time, and that my continued use of the Platform after such updates constitutes my acceptance of the updated version.

section2.title: 2. Data Protection, Privacy and Confidentiality
section2.text: I understand that DOCPATS MedConnect may process, store, and transmit personal and medical information as part of its services. By accepting the Terms and Conditions, I confirm that:
list: My personal data, including health and medical data, will be handled in accordance with the Privacy Policy and applicable data protection laws and regulations.
My data may be processed for medical services, secure communication, platform improvement, and legal compliance.
Access to my data may be granted only to authorized professionals on a need-to-know basis.
No system can be guaranteed to be 100% secure.

section3.title: 3. Accuracy of Information and User Responsibilities
section3.text: By accepting the Terms and Conditions, I confirm that:
list: All information I provide is accurate, complete, and up to date.
I am responsible for promptly updating my information.
I will keep my login credentials confidential.
Misuse may result in suspension or termination and legal consequences.

section4.title: 4. Legal and Regulatory Compliance
section4.text: I acknowledge that DOCPATS MedConnect operates within legal and regulatory requirements. I confirm that:
list: I will use the Platform in compliance with applicable laws.
If I am a healthcare professional, I am properly licensed.
I will comply with regional or institutional rules.

section5.title: 5. Acknowledgment and Final Consent Statement
section5.text: After reviewing the Terms and Conditions, I confirm:
section5.highlight: By continuing, I confirm that I have reviewed, understood, and accepted the Terms and Conditions of DOCPATS MedConnect and agree to comply with all applicable legal and regulatory requirements.

TermsConsentPage.footer: If I do not agree with any part of the Terms and Conditions, I should not continue to use the Platform.
TermsConsentPage.checkbox: I have read this consent statement and I agree to the Terms and Conditions, including all applicable policies and regulations.
